title: D3.2 Protocol 3: EPIC-WE Research Protocol for Cultural  Game Jams in Glocal Sites (Final protocol)
author: Somers Miles, Rachel
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The DBR interventions in WP4 will use local and glocal game jams across three  European sites to investigate the implementation, evaluation, and results of glocallocal ecosystems (T3.1) and glocal-local Cultural Game Jams (CGJs) using processes,  methods (T3.2) to support CHI, CI, HEI, and youth citizens (YCs) in creating games  through culture and games for culture. For this revised research protocol, the focus  is on glocal interventions
steps_raw: The DBR interventions in WP4 will use local and glocal game jams across three  European sites to investigate the implementation, evaluation, and results of glocallocal ecosystems (T3.1) and glocal-local Cultural Game Jams (CGJs) using processes,  methods (T3.2) to support CHI, CI, HEI, and youth citizens (YCs) in creating games  through culture and games for culture. For this revised research protocol, the focus  is on glocal interventions
